title: prunus × lannesiana f. praecox
intro: Prunus × lannesiana f. praecox, also known as the Japanese flowering cherry, is a cultivar of cherry blossom tree. It is valued for its early blooming flowers and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Prunus × lannesiana f. praecox include flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Prunus × lannesiana f. praecox include tea and extracts, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health.
